svg.title: cloud-ai-security-skills skill map
svg.desc: Every shipped skill in the repo grouped by layer. Layer 1 Ingest has 15 source-specific normalizers across AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, Okta, Entra, Google Workspace, and MCP. Layer 2 Discover has 4 inventory, AI BOM, and evidence skills. Layer 3 Detect has 9 deterministic detectors tied to MITRE ATT&CK. Layer 4 Evaluate has 7 benchmarks across cloud, Kubernetes, containers, model serving, and GPU clusters. Layer 5 Remediate has the IAM departures flagship. Layer 6 View has SARIF and Mermaid exporters. Edge adapters for warehouse sources and sinks wrap the same contract.

g.text: 44 shipped skill bundles grouped by layer. Same SKILL.md + src/ + tests/ contract across all of them.
Each tile is a real folder under skills/. Vendor marks are nominative only.
Raw source → stable event stream (native or OCSF 1.8)
Deterministic rules → OCSF 2004 Detection Finding with MITRE ATT&CK
skills/detection/ · one check per function · one finding per rule · frozen golden fixtures
